title: erigeron pseudotenuicaulis
intro: Erigeron pseudotenuicaulis, also known as the narrow-leaved fleabane, is a perennial plant species in the daisy family (Asteraceae). It is used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and treating wounds. In herbal preparations, Erigeron pseudotenuicaulis can be made into a tea, tincture, or infused oil to utilize its medicinal properties.
